zh:
华夏神话没有一部统一的圣典。盘古开天、女娲补天、羿射九日这些故事零散地保存在《淮南子》《楚辞》《山海经》以及汉代纬书的佚文之中，往往一则神话只剩几十个字，却撑起了整个宇宙的来历：天为什么倾向西北，江河为什么东流入海，人是怎么从黄土里来的。

这一体系最鲜明的气质是神话的历史化。伏羲、黄帝、大禹本是神话人物，却被史官纳入帝王谱系，《史记》径直以五帝开篇；发明文字、历法、医药、农耕的功绩层层归于三皇五帝名下，神话由此变成了族群的家谱，"炎黄子孙"至今仍是华人的自称。反过来，战败者如蚩尤、共工也未被抹去，一个成了历代兵家祭祀的战神，一个撞断天柱、给大地定下了永远的倾斜。

与诸神并立的还有一套瑞兽体系：龙司云雨、凤鸣岐山、麒麟不践生草，合龟而为"四灵"。它们出现与否被视为世道治乱的刻度——凤凰来仪则天下安宁，仁兽被猎则"吾道穷矣"。从六千年前的蚌塑龙到今天的舞龙灯与"嫦娥"探测器，这批上古形象始终在被续写。
en:
Chinese mythology has no single scripture. Pangu's opening of the cosmos, Nüwa's mending of the sky, and Yi's shooting of the nine suns survive as scattered passages in the Huainanzi, the Chu ci, the Shanhaijing, and fragments of Han apocrypha — often a few dozen characters that nonetheless account for the shape of the world: why heaven tilts to the northwest, why every river runs east to the sea, how people first came out of yellow clay.

The tradition's most distinctive trait is the historicization of its myths. Fuxi, the Yellow Emperor, and Yu the Great began as gods and culture heroes, yet the court historians folded them into the royal genealogy: the Records of the Grand Historian opens not with creation but with the Five Sovereigns, and writing, the calendar, medicine, and agriculture were all credited to their reigns. Myth became a family tree — Chinese still call themselves descendants of Yan and Huang. Nor were the defeated erased: Chiyou, crushed at Zhuolu, was worshipped by generals as the Lord of Arms, and Gonggong's rage against the pillar of heaven left the land permanently atilt.

Alongside the gods stands a distinct order of auspicious beasts: the dragon who brings rain, the phoenix whose cry on Mount Qi announced the rise of Zhou, the qilin who treads on no living grass — three of the Four Numinous Beasts. Their appearances were read as a gauge of the age: phoenixes dance when the world is well governed, and when hunters took a qilin, Confucius laid down his brush. From clamshell dragons laid out 6,400 years ago to the lunar probes named Chang'e, these ancient figures are still being written forward.
